message:
tests: add agent_loop_vcr module for VCR-based agent integration tests

New test module for running agent loops against recorded HTTP cassettes:

Test infrastructure:
- Uses VcrRecorder for HTTP request/response replay
- cassette_root(): returns tests/fixtures/vcr directory
- message_role(): helper for Message → role string
- format_event(): serializes AgentEvent to JSON for logging

agent_loop_openai_vcr_basic test:
- Loads rpc_prompt.json cassette (if present)
- Creates OpenAIProvider with VCR-wrapped HTTP client
- Configures Agent with ToolRegistry and StreamOptions
- Runs agent session with text prompt
- Captures all AgentEvent emissions for verification
- Writes event log to artifact file

Event capture:
- Uses Arc<Mutex<Vec<AgentEvent>>> for thread-safe collection
- Formats events to JSON for human-readable logs
- Records all lifecycle events: agent_start/end, turn_start/end,
  message_start/update/end, tool_exec_start/update/end

This enables deterministic integration testing of the full agent loop
without live API calls, supporting both development iteration and CI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
